channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump criticizes Sen. Bill Cassidy as 'disloyal disaster,' backs challenger Julia Letlow in Louisiana GOP primary
item.description: President Donald Trump attacked Sen. Bill Cassidy, R-LA, in a scathing social media attack while endorsing his primary challenger Rep. Julia Letlow, R...

item.title: Fmr Sen. Brown to Newsmax: Trump China trip a win on Iran, AI
item.description: Fmr Sen. Scott Brown, a Republican running for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire, praised President Trump's China summit as a diplomatic success, with AI a...

item.title: Feely to Newsmax: Rival's Obama ties don't fit Arizona GOP
item.description: Former NFL kicker and broadcaster Jay Feely is sharpening his attacks against rival John Trobough as the two Republicans battle in Arizona's closely w...

item.title: ActBlue CEO faces June 10 grilling after fundraising powerhouse allegedly misled Congress on foreign donations
item.description: ActBlue CEO Regina Wallace-Jones is set to face a congressional grilling on June 10 over alleged donor fraud and foreign donation safeguards.
